theme: Fresh spring color story with collector-friendly minis
audience: Newsletter subscribers first, then Instagram collectors and warm followers

checklist: Make sure each piece is tagged by size bucket: minis / darlings / babes / gems

landingPages.notes: Collector-specific landing pages should only include available work relevant to prior purchases.

newsletter.notes: Sarah usually sends Saturday releases, so this anchors the whole drop.
checklist: Include a clear 24-hour subscriber-only access reminder
Mention what sold during newsletter early access so scarcity feels real, not manufactured
